content: Autonomous curiosity-driven agents (from Topic A) can leverage a tiered 'episodic curiosity tagging' memory architecture that aligns with 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory designs, where unexpected, curiosity-triggered exploratory experiences are prioritized for longer retention and faster retrieval over routine interactions. This memory tagging framework turns implicit curiosity-driven exploration into explicit active learning data selection that outperforms static uncertainty-based sampling for open-ended agent tasks.
